rationale: The citing meta-analysis explicitly models recession/business-cycle conditions as substantive moderators of advertising’s firm-value elasticity, and the cited paper is a cross-country study of advertising’s business-cycle sensitivity with links to stock-price outcomes. That thematic overlap (advertising cyclicality + market-value consequences) makes the citation plausibly a mechanism/theory or empirical prior source rather than a clearly incidental mention. With only DOI-level match evidence, this is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only.
